text:
# LiveAzan — Local Development Environment
# Copy this file to .env.local and adjust if needed.
# These values are used by docker-compose.local.yml
# setup.py generates .env.local automatically.

DB_PASSWORD=liveaszan_dev
JWT_SECRET=local_dev_secret_not_for_production

# Default admin account (created automatically on first startup)
ADMIN_EMAIL=admin@liveaszan.local
ADMIN_PASSWORD=admin1234

# HOST_IP is used for mobile app development.
# setup.py auto-detects your LAN IP and writes it to apps/mobile/.env
# You can override here if auto-detection picks the wrong interface.
# HOST_IP=192.168.1.100
